description: .NET version upgrade plan from .NET Framework 4.5 / 4.7.2 to .NET 10.0

tasks.description: Upgrade JobSearch solution (NYCJobsWeb and DataLoader) from .NET Framework 4.7.2 / 4.5 to .NET 10.0
tasks.reason: .NET Framework 4.5 reached end of support on January 12, 2016 and .NET Framework 4.7.2 mainstream support ended April 25, 2023 — both versions are EOL and no longer receive security or quality fixes. The user explicitly requested an upgrade to the latest LTS version. Upgrading to .NET 10.0 LTS ensures long-term support, access to modern APIs, improved performance, and full compatibility with current Azure SDK packages.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade both projects in the JobSearch solution from .NET Framework (NYCJobsWeb targets v4.7.2; DataLoader targets v4.5) to net10.0. This includes: converting legacy non-SDK-style .csproj files to SDK-style format; updating the TargetFramework to net10.0; migrating NuGet dependencies from packages.config to PackageReference with net10.0-compatible versions; migrating the NYCJobsWeb ASP.NET MVC 5 (System.Web) application to ASP.NET Core MVC on .NET 10; resolving any API incompatibilities introduced by the framework change; and verifying the solution builds successfully.
